center.name: 曼哈頓
center.summary: 曼哈頓是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括红尾鵟，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Unlike some other raptors, the red-tailed hawk is seemingly unfazed by considerable human activity and can nest and live in close proximity to large numbers of humans. Thus, the species can also be found in cities, where common prey such as rock pigeons and brown rats may support their populations. One famous urban red-tailed hawk, known as "Pale Male", became the subject of a nonfiction book, Red-Tails in Love: A Wildlife Drama in Central Park, and is the first known red-tail in decades to successfully nest and raise young in the crowded New York City borough of Manhattan.Pale Male – Introduction – Red-tailed Hawk in New York City |Nature
